hero.headline: Precision you can see.
hero.subheadline: Automotive, security and PPF window films with German engineering standards for demanding installers and dealerships.

brand.label: Our story
brand.title: German engineering, universal precision
brand.body: Kristall Film was born from an obsession with detail. Each film is the result of decades of research in precision optics and high-performance materials, applied today to the automotive and architectural industries.
brand.dark_body: Every product meets rigorous engineering specifications before reaching installation.
brand.cert1_body: Process control in every production batch

products.label: Products
products.klar_desc: High solar rejection with durable dye technology. Available in 5%, 20%, 35% and 50% transmission.
products.karbon_desc: Carbon nanoparticle technology for maximum solar rejection without signal interference.
products.keramx_desc: The best window film technology: high-performance nanoceramic with superior optical clarity.
products.krypton_desc: Nanoceramic technology with fragment retention on impact and intrusion resistance. Maximum protection for occupants and assets.
products.ppf_desc: Invisible automotive paint protection against impacts, scratches and chemical agents.
products.vitral_desc: Solar control for high-end commercial and residential glazing. Decorative and privacy options.

services.label: Services
services.svc1_desc: Professional film installation on dealership fleets. Standardized process, controlled timing and brand warranty.
services.svc2_desc: Digital platform for dealerships: order tracking, film inventory and installation reports.

cta.title: Ready to elevate your installation?
cta.subtitle: Contact our team and receive a custom proposal in 24 hours.

footer.tagline: German high-performance window film technology for installers and dealerships.
